What We Do

Our Services

Professional carpenter solutions tailored to your needs.

Custom Cabinets

Maximize your space with beautifully crafted custom cabinets.

Learn More →

Deck Repair & Installation

Build or restore your outdoor living space with expert deck services.

Learn More →

Framing Services

Ensure structural integrity with our expert framing services.

Learn More →

Door Installation & Repair

Upgrade your doors with our professional installation and repair services.

Learn More →

Window Installation & Repair

Improve your home's energy efficiency with our window services.

Learn More →

Trim & Molding

Add the perfect finishing touches to your home with custom trim work.

Learn More →
Flexible Options

Financing That Works With Your Goals

We believe every customer deserves access to top-quality carpenter services. That's why we offer flexible options to fit any budget. No stress, no surprises — just a clear path forward.

  • Low monthly payments
  • Quick approval process
  • No hidden fees

Reviews

Trusted By Our Community

Virginia Home Repair did an amazing job with our kitchen cabinets! They helped us design custom cabinets that perfectly fit our space and style. The quality of the workmanship is outstanding, and the installation was seamless. We couldn't be happier!

Sarah M.
★★★★★

Our deck was in rough shape after the winter, but Virginia Home Repair brought it back to life. They replaced several damaged boards and reinforced the railings. The work was done quickly and efficiently, and the price was very reasonable. I would definitely recommend them.

David K.
★★★★

We recently had Virginia Home Repair install a new front door, and we're thrilled with the results. The door is beautiful and secure, and the installation was flawless. The team was professional and courteous throughout the entire process. Thanks!

Emily R.
★★★★★

Virginia Home Repair replaced all the windows in our house, and we've already noticed a difference in our energy bills. The new windows are energy-efficient and look great. The installation team was efficient and cleaned up everything afterwards. Highly recommend!

John L.
★★★★★

We hired Virginia Home Repair for the framing on our home addition. They did an excellent job, ensuring that everything was square, plumb, and structurally sound. The team was professional and communicative throughout the project.

Jessica T.
★★★★

Virginia Home Repair added beautiful trim and molding to our living room, and it completely transformed the space. The craftsmanship is impeccable, and the attention to detail is impressive. We're so happy with the results!

Michael B.
★★★★★
Read All Reviews →
How It Works

We'll Guide You Through!

From first call to final walkthrough, here's what to expect.

01

Contact Our Team

Reach out by phone or through our online form. We'll schedule a time that works best for you.

02

Inspection

Our certified team will thoroughly evaluate your needs and provide a detailed, transparent estimate.

03

We Get to Work

Our experienced team handles everything — from start to finish — with precision and care.

04

Final Walkthrough

We walk through the completed work with you to ensure every detail meets our high standards.

Who We Are

A Local Business For Your Local Community

Our Promise

Why Choose Virginia Home Repair

Excellence

We hold ourselves to the highest standards on every single job — no shortcuts, no compromises.

Community

We're your neighbors first. Every job we complete strengthens the community we call home.

Integrity

Honest pricing, transparent communication, and doing what we say we'll do — every single time.

FAQ

Your Questions, Our Expert Advice

What materials do you use for custom cabinets?
We work with a wide range of materials, including hardwoods like maple and oak, softwoods like pine, and various laminates. We'll help you choose the best materials based on your budget, style, and durability requirements, considering the coastal environment of Virginia Beach.
How long does it take to build custom cabinets?
The timeline depends on the complexity of the design and the materials chosen. We'll provide you with a realistic estimate during the consultation phase, keeping you informed throughout the process.
Do you offer installation services?
Yes, we provide professional installation services to ensure your custom cabinets are perfectly fitted and securely installed. Our team takes pride in their attention to detail and commitment to quality.

Excellence. Community. Integrity.
That's Virginia Home Repair.

Ready to get started? Fill out the form and our team will be in touch within 24 hours.
